steps.title: Spot the crucial measurement
steps.content: The claim depends on one testable fact: whether putting a work online actually reaches more people. The strongest signal is a direct comparison of online audience size to the in-person museum audience.

steps.title: Apply the comparison to the choices
steps.content: D answers this directly: more annual accesses to the online image than in-person museum visits, proving online availability does expand total reach. A lists museum inventory (irrelevant), B documents visitor opinions about the museum (not about the work's reach), and C notes critical praise (not audience size). That matches choice D — D is correct.
